description: Research demographic and connectivity statistics for a telehealth pilot program. Compare Sumter County (Florida), Marin County (California), and Yavapai County (Arizona) using the US Census Bureau's QuickFacts (census.gov/quickfacts). For each county, extract the most recent values for: percent of population 65 and over, percent of households with broadband, median household income (2022 dollars), and percent of persons with a disability under 65. Save the data to ~/Documents/telehealth_pilot_data.json using county keys 'sumter_fl', 'marin_ca', and 'yavapai_az' and metric keys 'pct_65_plus', 'pct_broadband', 'median_income_usd', and 'pct_disability_under_65'. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Pilot Site Research' containing the QuickFacts comparison view URL.
